message:
test(e2e): Add visual regression test suite

- Add component visual tests for PromptCard, Hero, SpotlightSearch, BasketSidebar, PromptDetailModal
- Add full page screenshot tests for all major pages in light/dark modes
- Add mobile viewport tests (iPhone 13-like) and tablet tests (iPad-like)
- Add data-testid="prompt-card" and data-featured attributes to PromptCard component

Tests cover:
- Light/dark mode variants
- Hover states
- Featured card styling
- Mobile-responsive layouts
- SpotlightSearch states
- Basket sidebar states
- 404 error page

Note: Run with --update-snapshots to generate baselines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -161,6 +161,8 @@ export function PromptCard({ prompt, index = 0, onCopy, onClick }: PromptCardPro
       className="h-full"
     >
       <Card
+        data-testid="prompt-card"
+        data-featured={prompt.featured ? "true" : undefined}
         className={cn(
           "group relative flex flex-col h-full cursor-pointer overflow-hidden",
           // Base styles - clean, neutral
